Uses of Package
com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.generators

  • Packages that use com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.generators 
    Package Description
    com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration
    Contains classes to perform calibration of accelerometers, gyroscopes and magnetometers.
    com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.generators
    Contains classes to generate measurements required for the calibration of accelerometers, gyroscopes and magnetometers after detecting static and dynamic intervals.
  • Classes in com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.generators used by com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration 
    Class Description
    AccelerometerAndGyroscopeMeasurementsGenerator
    Generates measurements for the calibration of accelerometers and gyroscopes by alternating static and dynamic intervals where device is kept static or moved.
    AccelerometerGyroscopeAndMagnetometerMeasurementsGenerator
    Generates measurements for the calibration of accelerometers and gyroscopes by alternating static and dynamic intervals where device is kept static or moved.
  • Classes in com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.generators used by com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.generators 
    Class Description
    AccelerometerAndGyroscopeMeasurementsGenerator
    Generates measurements for the calibration of accelerometers and gyroscopes by alternating static and dynamic intervals where device is kept static or moved.
    AccelerometerAndGyroscopeMeasurementsGeneratorListener
    Interface defining events generated by AccelerometerAndGyroscopeMeasurementsGenerator.
    AccelerometerGyroscopeAndMagnetometerMeasurementsGenerator
    Generates measurements for the calibration of accelerometers and gyroscopes by alternating static and dynamic intervals where device is kept static or moved.
    AccelerometerGyroscopeAndMagnetometerMeasurementsGeneratorListener
    Interface defining events generated by AccelerometerGyroscopeAndMagnetometerMeasurementsGenerator.
    AccelerometerMeasurementsGenerator
    Generates measurements for the calibration of accelerometers by alternating static and dynamic intervals where device is kept static or moved.
    AccelerometerMeasurementsGeneratorListener
    Interface defining events generated by AccelerometerMeasurementsGenerator.
    GyroscopeMeasurementGeneratorListener
    Interface defining events generated by GyroscopeMeasurementsGenerator.
    GyroscopeMeasurementsGenerator
    Generates measurements for the calibration of gyroscopes by alternating static and dynamic intervals where device is kept static or moved.
    MagnetometerMeasurementsGenerator
    Generates measurements for the calibration of magnetometers by alternating static and dynamic intervals where device is kept static or moved.
    MagnetometerMeasurementsGeneratorListener
    Interface defining events generated by MagnetometerMeasurementsGenerator.
    MeasurementsGenerator
    Base class to generate measurements for the calibration of accelerometers, gyroscopes or magnetometers after detection of static/dynamic intervals.
    MeasurementsGeneratorListener
    Interface defining events generated by a generator.
